summary: UI Enhancement Block 19 - All 3 blocks implemented correctly. BLOCK 19.1 (Optimistic Likes): Like button has p-2 padding for larger touch target, -m-2 negative margin, active:scale-125 animation, touchAction:manipulation, and failure toast 'Sticky situation—try again'. BLOCK 19.2 (VariantTag): Component has Disc icon for both regular and glassmorphism modes, glass mode uses backdrop-filter blur 4px with dark transparent bg and white text. BLOCK 19.3 (Collector Notes): NowSpinningCard displays record.notes with italic serif styling and 60-char truncation, ListingPostCard has pressing_notes display.
critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 19.1 like button implementation is complete with all required features (p-2, -m-2, active:scale-125, touchAction, failure toast)
BLOCK 19.2 VariantTag glassmorphism works but no records in feed currently have color_variant set - data dependent, not a code issue
BLOCK 19.3 Collector notes display verified working with record that has notes='Imported from Discogs'
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI Enhancement Block 19 verified. Key findings: (1) Like button at HivePage.js line 289-298 has all optimistic UI features - p-2 padding, -m-2 margin, active:scale-125, touchAction:manipulation. handleLike function at line 526-550 implements optimistic update with rollback and 'Sticky situation—try again' toast. (2) VariantTag at PostCards.js line 125-147 has Disc icon in both modes, glassmorphism uses backdrop-filter:blur(4px) with rgba(0,0,0,0.35) background. Currently no records have color_variant set so pills don't appear in feed - this is expected. (3) NowSpinningCard line 176 shows record.notes with italic serif font, truncated to 60 chars. Verified working with 'Imported from Discogs' text visible in UI. (4) ListingPostCard line 395 has pressing_notes display with same styling.

frontend_tests.variant_tag_glassmorphism: CODE VERIFIED - backdrop-filter blur 4px at line 133
